name: @fabrikav2/phaser-shell
description: Phaser Editor / Phaser-native shell tooling for the dual-design-frontends experiment (U5/U6 implement; U1 preseeds the lane workspace, the accepted phaser@4.2.1 pin, and the frozen toolchain U5/U6 will consume — those stages add scripts/source only, never dependencies).

scripts.verify-authoring: npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run lint && npm run validate
